title: New to AI policy?
subtitle: Eight essentials to get you oriented in roughly ten hours of reading.

items.blurb: Start here. Sets the vocabulary the whole debate uses and why alignment is a first-order problem.
Short and load-bearing: why the field's trajectory favours scale over cleverness.
Five concrete failure modes — the applied-alignment agenda in miniature.
The national-security frame. Establishes stakes for state actors and compute governance.
A scenario forecast that takes the timeline question seriously, month by month.
A positive vision of powerful AI. Counterweight to the risk-heavy reads above.

items.title_hint: Executive Order on Safe, Secure AI
items.blurb: What US federal executive-branch action looked like in practice.
Ends with what policy could do — governance framing from a deployer.
